title: Why Trump Wants to Celebrate His Birthday With a Cage Fight
description: The president has chosen blood sport as the day’s entertainment for a reason.

title: The First 18 Months
description: A Cabinet meeting with my son, who is exactly as old as the current administration
author: Alexandra Petri

title: The Congresswoman Who Got Trump’s Name Off the Kennedy Center
description: Representative Joyce Beatty sued over the president’s control of the arts complex. The effort to keep it open isn’t over.

description: Even Russia’s leading warmonger has run out of ways to justify the Ukraine invasion.

title: American Democracy Wasn’t Designed for This
description: Can our 18th-century institutions survive 21st-century technology?

description: Joe Picard is one of the few left with a personal memory of the 20th century’s greatest military operation.

title: The J6 Rioter Now Working at the Pentagon
description: His hiring is part of a dangerous trend in the Trump administration.

title: ObsessionKnows What the TikTok Generation Fears Most
description: Avoiding vulnerability comes with ghastly consequences.

title: The Supreme Court Has Invented a Right to Discriminate
description: Alabama gambled on the Court’s partisanship, and won.

description: Nate Bargatze’s big-screen experiment is a bust.

title: What Dogs See That We Can’t
description: Consciousness separates us from machines. Need convincing? Just take a good look at a faithful canine.

description: Flipping the kill switch is a potent exercise of authoritarian control.
